series_metadata.series_title: Money Follows the Person (MFP) Administration Files
series_metadata.series_description: Consumer case records for federally approved Money Follows the Person (MFP) program and Ohio Access Success Project. Includes consumer enrollment and intake, assessment and referral, cost cap for level of care, administrative approvals and maintenance documenting consumer medical history (diagnosis and treatment) and provider service to recipients.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office or all cases are closed
